designation: Senior Architect / Lead Engineer (AI/ML & Cloud Platform)
summaryPoints: Built **document ingestion APIs (FastAPI)** to receive files/metadata, storing documents in **GCS** and structured data in **Firestore**
Developed **event-driven pipeline** using **GCS-triggered Cloud Functions** to process ML-extracted JSON and persist results
Engineered a full **HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) platform** (Angular SSR + FastAPI) for document review, edit, validation, and submission workflows
Implemented **SAML-based authentication (passport.js)** and secure **GCS signed URL access** for document rendering
Integrated backend services with **external APIs** for final data submission
Containerized apps using **Docker**, deployed via **Artifact Registry + Cloud Run**, and supported **Dev/SIT/UAT releases**
Contributed to **Git workflows (PRs, reviews)**, deployment coordination, and ongoing enhancements for production readiness
summaryPoints1: Designed and developed document ingestion APIs (FastAPI) to securely receive documents and metadata, storing files in GCS and structured data in Firestore
Built event-driven processing by integrating GCS-triggered Cloud Functions to parse ML-extracted JSON outputs and persist structured data for downstream systems
Engineered a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) platform (Angular SSR + FastAPI) enabling users to review, edit, validate, and submit extracted document data with full lifecycle control
Implemented SAML-based authentication and token validation (passport.js) to securely integrate with enterprise identity systems
Developed backend services for: 1) Fetching and updating Firestore data, 2) Managing validation rules and business logic, 3)Submitting processed data to external Deloitte APIs
Enabled secure document access using GCS Signed URLs for rendering documents in HITL UI
Designed rich UI workflows including pagination, editable forms, validation controls, and submission lifecycle (save/reset/submit states)
Collaborated with ML teams by integrating downstream outputs (JSON) into application pipelines (without direct model development)
Containerized frontend and backend applications using Docker, published to Artifact Registry, and deployed to Cloud Run
Played a key role in manual CI/CD processes, including Git branching, PR reviews, approvals, and release coordination
Supported multi-environment deployments (Dev, SIT, UAT) and actively contributing toward production rollout
Partnered with operations and client teams (LDH, Deloitte) to meet aggressive delivery timelines, including critical weekend releases
Currently driving enhancements, production readiness, and team support across deployment and feature development
Exploring secure configuration management using GCP Secret Manager

summaryPoints: **Architect and maintained scalable full-stack applications** using **React.js (Redux, Hooks)** for the front end and **Node.js, .NET Core, Python**, and Ruby on Rails for backend APIs.

Collaborated with product, QA, and cloud teams to reduce backlog by 50% and accelerate delivery.

**Mentored junior engineers** in **clean coding**, and **cloud-native development**.
Architect and developed **enterprise-scale applications** leveraging **.NET, React, Node.js, and Azure**, enhancing performance, scalability, and reliability.
Designed and delivered **mission-critical REST APIs** (.NET and Node.js) for healthcare, achieving **99.99% uptime** and seamless third-party integrations that reduced development time by **35%.**
Strong hands-on programming expertise in **Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and C#**, applying best practices for maintainable and high-quality code.
Spearheaded the **migration of monolithic applications to cloud-based microservices (Azure, AWS)**, cutting infrastructure costs by **25%.**
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (PMs, QA, clients) to resolve technical issues and ensure timely project delivery.
Mentored and coached engineers, increasing **team velocity by 20%** and **onboarding 30%**.
Written test cases using NUnit and XUnit with 98% code coverage.
Led large-scale **software deployments**, ensuring efficient rollout of complex systems in production.

**Designed and delivered high-performance software solutions** in collaboration with cross-functional teams, **leading large-scale deployments and integrating third-party tools** (ASP.NET, C#, JS, Telerik).
